inputs.label: Wake-up time (24h decimal)
inputs.businessContext: The desired wake-up time in decimal hours (e.g., 7.5 = 7:30 AM).

businessContext_i18n.es: La hora de despertar deseada en horas decimales (ej. 7.5 = 7:30 AM).
